summary: Frontend refactoring testing completed. All 5 extracted components (Sidebar.jsx, FunnelPage.jsx, LeadDiscoveryPage.jsx, BookingDialog.jsx, StatusBadge.jsx) are working correctly. Navigation, page rendering, and component interactions all pass.
critical_code_review_comments: Sidebar.jsx: Correctly implements responsive design with mobile/desktop variants. Uses data-testid attributes for all nav items.
FunnelPage.jsx: Properly displays all funnel stages (New Leads, Contacted, Qualified, Booked) with lead cards and action buttons.
LeadDiscoveryPage.jsx: Shows leads table with status badges, intent signals, and action buttons (Call, Book, Verify, Delete).
BookingDialog.jsx: Opens correctly when clicking Book button, shows agent selection dropdown and notes field.
StatusBadge.jsx: Renders correct status labels and colors for all statuses (New, Qualified, Not Qualified, Active, Draft, Cancelled).
App.js reduced from ~5,800 lines to ~4,108 lines - good modularization.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend refactoring complete. All extracted components verified working: Sidebar.jsx (navigation), FunnelPage.jsx (sales funnel), LeadDiscoveryPage.jsx (lead discovery), BookingDialog.jsx (booking modal), StatusBadge.jsx (status labels). App.js imports all components correctly. No issues found.

tests: Desktop sidebar visible and functional
All nav items clickable (Funnel, Lead Discovery, Campaigns, Agents, Bookings, etc.)
User info and credits displayed correctly
Sign Out button present
Page loads with 'Sales Funnel' title
All 4 funnel stages displayed (New Leads, Contacted, Qualified, Booked)
Lead cards show business name, phone, and action buttons
Stats bar shows Total Leads, Qualification Rate, Booking Rate, Total Calls
Campaign selector dropdown present
Page loads with 'Lead Discovery' title
AI Discovery and Upload CSV tabs present
Intent Keywords section with keyword chips
Discovered Leads table with status badges
Action buttons (Call, Book, Verify, Delete) functional
Dialog opens when clicking Book button on qualified lead
Shows 'Book Meeting for [Lead Name]' title
Agent selection dropdown present
Notes field present
Cancel and Book Meeting buttons functional
Renders correct labels: New, Qualified, Not Qualified, Active, Draft, Cancelled
Correct color coding for each status
Used consistently across Funnel, Lead Discovery, Campaigns, Bookings pages
